name: Harvest Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add thinly sliced carrots and cook until tender-crisp, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in sliced green onions (with tops) and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Mix in cooked brown rice, seedless raisins, sesame seeds, and salt.
5. Cook, stirring frequently, until the mixture is thoroughly heated and all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Each serving provides:
234 calories
3.1 grams protein
8.3 grams fat
38.8 grams carbohydrate
189 milligrams sodium
0 milligrams cholesterol
Source: Cooking with Rice
